ValidationRule.description: Prevents manually moving an Order to Sync to ERP when a future Delay Invoice Date is set. To bypass delayed invoicing, amend the order and remove the Delay Invoice Date first.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status), TEXT(Status) = 'Sync to ERP', NOT(ISBLANK(Delay_Invoice_Date__c)), Delay_Invoice_Date__c > TODAY() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This order has a future Delay Invoice Date and cannot be manually moved to Sync to ERP. To bypass the delayed invoicing process, please amend the order and remove the Delay Invoice Date first.
